title: elaphoglossum foeniculaceum
intro: Elaphoglossum foeniculaceum, also known as "false fennel fern", is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Central and South America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Elaphoglossum foeniculaceum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures.
